title: Cynanchica littoralis
intro:
I couldn't find any information on the plant Cynanchica littoralis. However, I found information on Cynanchum, which is a genus of plants in the Apocynaceae family. 

Cynanchum is a type of plant commonly known as the 'Viper's Bugloss' or 'Cynanchum'. It is a perennial herb native to Europe and Asia, known for its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties.

The health benefits of Cynanchum include its ability to reduce inflammation and improve digestion, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. Its bioactive constituents include alkaloids, flavonoids, and saponins, which are responsible for its medicinal properties.

The most common herbal preparations made with Cynanchum include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are used to treat a range of health issues, including digestive problems and skin conditions.
